programmes.show_name: Can You Keep It Up For A Week?
programmes.show_description: Comedy. Annette will marry Gil, her hapless boyfriend, on condition he keeps his new job for a week without getting up to mischief with other women. Contains sexual scenes.
1/8. How much will the collectors and dealers bid for a Banksy artwork, pickled pig foetuses and Tommy Cooper's fez?
1/5, The estate gets ready for Easter, as castle manager John organises an egg hunt and head of visitor reception Paul prepares the vintage Rolls-Royce. Will the first event of the season go to plan?
6/8. Explaining the difference between 'use by', 'best before' and 'display until,' the safety of supermarket pork and the challenges facing Scottish salmon.

Jazzy Whipps is the UK's biggest deaf influencer - but success brings trolling. It takes courage and resilience to be Jazzy. Funded and supported by Together TV and BSLBT.
Tom Norrington-Davies celebrates British cuisine, visiting Jersey cows and harvests asparagus to make a starter. 2/10
It is July and the team face their busiest month so far. Historian Ruth Goodman tries her hand at salmon netting, and there is a rare opportunity for a day away from the farm.

programmes.show_name: The World Is Full of Married Men
programmes.show_description: David Cooper works in advertising but spends more time on his extra-marital love life. When his wife discovers his affairs, she decides to get her revenge. Contains nudity.
Stories from men working in the music industry and the toll it has taken on their mental health and wellbeing. Featuring Rag'n'Bone Man, Dev IDLES and Geoff Barrow from Portishead.

Our Land is the story of two black food growers who refuse to be held back by barriers of race, class, or land injustice. A film supported and funded by Together TV.
Tom is looking for the best lamb stew in Wales and cooks a classic lamb roast. 3/10
August brings the climax of the farming year, and the end of 12 months on the Edwardian Farm for the team. They must harvest their oat crop, but everything depends on the weather.

programmes.show_name: Mary Millington: Come Play With Me
programmes.show_description: Two hapless forgers hide out in a Scottish manor house. When a troupe of dancing girls join them musical numbers, comedy and sauce ensues. Contains sexual scenes.
